verses.text: God bids Moses send men to spy out Canaan. The spies. They go to survey the promise.
God bids Moses send men to spy out Canaan. The spies. They go to survey the promise.
God bids Moses send men to spy out Canaan. The spies. They go to survey the promise.
A man from each tribe is named, among them Caleb and Joshua. The twelve. Each tribe has its scout.

Moses bids them see the land, its people, and its fruit. The charge. They are to bring back word.
Moses bids them see the land, its people, and its fruit. The charge. They are to bring back word.

They search forty days and cut a great cluster at Eshcol. The fruit. The land is rich indeed.
They search forty days and cut a great cluster at Eshcol. The fruit. The land is rich indeed.

They search forty days and cut a great cluster at Eshcol. The fruit. The land is rich indeed.
They report the land flows with milk and honey. Good land. God's word is confirmed.
They report the land flows with milk and honey. Good land. God's word is confirmed.
They report the land flows with milk and honey. Good land. God's word is confirmed.
'Nevertheless the people be strong, and the cities walled.' Fear. They see only the giants.
'Nevertheless the people be strong, and the cities walled.' Fear. They see only the giants.
Caleb says, 'We are well able'; the others say they cannot. Divided. Faith and fear collide.
Caleb says, 'We are well able'; the others say they cannot. Divided. Faith and fear collide.
They bring an evil report, calling themselves grasshoppers. Evil report. Unbelief shrinks the soul.
They bring an evil report, calling themselves grasshoppers. Evil report. Unbelief shrinks the soul.
